# setDelegate(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sets the delegate of the `NSExceptionHandler` object.

## Declaration

```swift
func setDelegate(_ anObject: Any!)
```

## Parameters

- **anObject**: The object to receive the delegation messages described in [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ExceptionHandling/nsexceptionhandlerdelegate#Logging-and-handling-exceptions]

## Getting and setting the delegate

- **delegate()**: Returns the delegate of the `NSExceptionHandler` object.
